Metadata.title: MyBob — AI Meal Tracker
Metadata.description: AI meal tracking with just a photo. Automatic calorie and nutrient analysis, with daily, weekly, and monthly reports.
Metadata.keywords: meal tracker, calorie counter, AI analysis, diet, nutrition, health

notes: Payments are securely processed through Lemon Squeezy (Merchant of Record).
Subscriptions auto-renew at the end of each period and can be canceled at any time.
PRO features remain available until the end of the subscription period after cancellation.
Full refund within 7 days if unused; no refunds thereafter.
With auto-cancel, it ends automatically without rebilling.

otp.title: Email Verification
otp.desc: We will send a 6-digit code to your email. Danger zone PIN will be reset after verification.

items.title: Photo Storage
items.cloud: Photos are securely stored on encrypted servers. Only you can access them.
items.local: Photos are stored only in your browser storage (IndexedDB). They are not sent to the server.

items.title: Authentication
items.content: We use JWT token-based authentication. Cloud storage is only available when logged in.

items.title: Nutrition Data
items.cloud: Nutrition logs are securely stored on encrypted servers. Only you can access them.
items.local: Nutrition logs are stored only in your local storage (mybob_meals). They are not sent to the server.

items.title: AI Analysis
items.content: Food photos are sent to Google Gemini API for analysis. Original images are not stored on Gemini servers (based on Google policy).

items.title: Third-party
items.content: Personal info such as name, email, and meal logs are not provided to third parties.

quickLog.guide: AI will automatically calculate calories. Analysis count will not be deducted.

sections.title: Article 1 (Purpose)
sections.content: This agreement aims to prescribe the rights, duties, and responsibilities between MyBob (hereinafter referred to as "Service") and users regarding the use of AI-based meal recording and analysis services provided by the Service.

sections.title: Article 2 (Definition)
sections.content:
① "Service" refers to all functions provided through the mybob.kr domain.
② "User" refers to a person who agrees to these terms and uses the service.
③ "PRO Member" refers to a user who has paid for a paid subscription plan.

sections.title: Article 3 (Effectiveness and Change)
sections.content:
① These terms apply to all users who wish to use the service.
② The service may change these terms within the scope of not violating relevant laws and regulations, and will provide prior guidance through in-app notices when changing.

sections.title: Article 4 (Service Use)
sections.content:
① The service allows membership registration through social login via Google accounts.
② Users may not steal other people's information or use the service for illegal purposes.
③ The service provides functions such as AI food analysis, meal records, and nutrition reports, and does not replace medical diagnosis.

sections.title: Article 5 (Paid Services)
sections.content:
① The PRO plan is automatically billed a subscription fee of ₩900 per month.
② Payments are processed through Paddle (paddle.com), and the service does not store card information.
③ Subscription cancellation is possible through the app settings or Paddle customer center, and PRO functions are maintained until the end of the current subscription period after cancellation.

sections.title: Article 6 (Service Interruption)
sections.content: The service may temporarily suspend service provision for inevitable reasons such as system maintenance, natural disasters, or technical problems, in which case users will be informed through prior notice.

sections.title: Article 7 (User Obligations)
sections.content:
① Users must comply with relevant laws and the provisions of these terms when using the service.
② Unauthorized collection, storage, and disclosure of other people's personal information is prohibited.
③ Acts that interfere with the normal operation of the service are prohibited.

sections.title: Article 8 (Limitation of Liability)
sections.content:
① AI analysis results provided by the service are for reference only and should not be used as a basis for medical judgment.
② The service is not responsible for service use obstacles caused by user negligence.

sections.title: Article 9 (Personal Information Protection)
sections.content: User's personal information is collected, used, and protected according to the Privacy Policy. Please check the Privacy Policy for details.

sections.title: Article 10 (Dispute Resolution)
sections.content: In case of a dispute related to the use of the service, the service and the user will strive to resolve it through mutual agreement. If no agreement is reached, it will be handled according to relevant laws and regulations.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: For inquiries about the terms of use, please contact luckyyyj77@gmail.com.

sections.title: 1. Collected Information
sections.content:
MyBob collects the following personal information to provide services.

· Email address (Google social login)
· Nickname (Automatically generated or directly entered by PRO members)
· Profile picture (PRO member, optional)
· Meal photos and analysis data (When cloud storage is selected)
· Physical information (Height, weight, age, gender — encrypted and stored on the device)
· Payment information (Processed by Paddle, MyBob does not store it)

sections.title: 2. Purpose of Collection
sections.content:
· Member authentication and account management
· Providing AI food analysis and meal record services
· Generating nutrition reports and coach comments
· Subscription plan management and function limit application
· Service improvement and statistical analysis

sections.title: 3. Storage Method
sections.content:
MyBob provides two storage methods.

[Local Storage]
Photos and meal data are stored only on the device (IndexedDB). No data other than authentication information is sent to the server.

[Cloud Storage]
Photos and meal data are encrypted and sent/stored on Supabase (located in the USA) servers. Multi-device synchronization is possible.

Physical information (height, weight, etc.) is stored encrypted with AES-256-GCM on the device regardless of the storage method.

sections.title: 4. Third-party Provision
sections.content:
MyBob uses the following external services, and only the minimum data necessary for service operation is transferred.

· Google (Authentication): Email
· Google Gemini API (AI analysis): Meal photos (Not stored after analysis)
· Supabase (Database/Storage): Meal data, photos (When cloud storage is selected)
· Paddle (Payment): Email, subscription information (Card information is not stored by MyBob)

We do not provide personal information to third parties other than for the above purposes.

sections.title: 5. Retention and Destruction
sections.content:
· Upon member withdrawal, all personal information and meal data stored on the server are immediately deleted.
· When switching from cloud to local, server data is scheduled for automatic deletion after 15 days.
· Local data can be deleted by the user directly in Settings > Danger Zone.
· Payment-related records may be kept for a certain period according to relevant laws and regulations.

sections.title: 6. User Rights
sections.content:
Users can exercise the following rights at any time.

· Viewing and exporting own data (Settings > Export)
· Modifying personal information (Settings > Profile)
· Withdrawing from service and deleting everything (Settings > Danger Zone > Delete Account)
· Inquiries about personal information processing (luckyyyj77@gmail.com)

sections.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking
sections.content: MyBob does not use separate marketing cookies or third-party tracking tools. Only authentication tokens for session maintenance are stored in local storage.

sections.title: 8. Privacy Officer
sections.content:
For inquiries regarding personal information processing, please contact us below.

Email: luckyyyj77@gmail.com
Processing period: within 3 business days

sections.title: 9. Policy Change
sections.content: In case the Privacy Policy is changed, prior guidance will be provided through in-app notices. The changed policy takes effect 7 days after the notice.

summary.title: Core Summary
items: Within 7 days of payment: Full refund if unused
Subscription cancellation: Billing stops from the next payment date, available for current month

sections.title: 1. Subscription Cancellation
sections.content:
PRO monthly subscription can be canceled at any time.

· Cancel in App Settings > Subscription Management or request via luckyyyj77@gmail.com.
· PRO functions are maintained until the end of the current billing period (end of month) after cancellation.
· Automatic billing stops from the month following cancellation.

sections.title: 2. Refund Conditions
sections.content:
[Full refund possible]
· If the service has not been substantially used within 7 days of the initial payment
· If PRO functions could not be used for more than 7 consecutive days due to service failure

[Refund not possible]
· If more than 7 days have passed since payment
· If PRO functions (AI analysis, cloud storage, etc.) have already been used
· If you want to cancel the subscription due to a simple change of mind (available for the current month after cancellation)

sections.title: 3. How to Apply for Refund
sections.content:
If you want a refund, please contact us at the email below.

Email: luckyyyj77@gmail.com
Subject: [Refund Request] MyBob PRO Subscription
Content: Payment date, payment email address, reason for refund

It will be processed within 3 business days after receipt.

sections.title: 4. Refund Processing
sections.content: Refunds are processed through Paddle, the payment method, and it may take 3-5 business days for the refund to be reflected depending on the card company.

sections.title: 5. Payment Error
sections.content: Erroneous charges due to duplicate payments, system errors, etc., will be fully refunded immediately upon confirmation. Please contact us with the same email address.

sections.title: 6. Consumer Protection
sections.content: This refund policy complies with the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, etc., and relevant laws and regulations. Consumer rights prescribed by law take precedence over this policy.

about.title: ABOUT
about.content:
MyBob is an AI-based meal analysis and health management platform.
We welcome various forms of collaboration such as advertising partnerships, brand collaborations, and service partnerships.

email.title: EMAIL
email.guide: Please include [Partnership] in the email subject.

intro.title: My records are mine
intro.desc: MyBob saves all data only on this device by default. Photos, meal logs, nutrition info — we don't send them to the server.

intro.title: Cloud is optional
intro.desc: If you want to use it on multiple devices or want community features, you can choose cloud storage. It will be provided as a subscription service later.

intro.title: Changeable at any time
intro.desc: You can freely switch between local and cloud in Settings > Storage Mode. Data moves together when switching.

intro.title: Right to complete deletion
intro.desc: You can request deletion of server data at any time while using the cloud. It is completely deleted after a 15-day grace period.

Onboarding.howToUse: How would you like to use it?
Onboarding.changeLater: You can change it anytime in settings later.

You can switch to cloud anytime in settings.
